entries.title: Duplicated helper areas
entries.content: Auth setup, payload defaults, and response assertions are copied across account, payment, and notification suites.

entries.title: Do not build a shared framework
entries.content: Keep the refactor small: shared fixture factories and response assertions only. Avoid creating a test framework inside the test suite.

entries.title: Parked for contract export
entries.content: Platform team expects to publish the final service contract export before the next refactor pass.
